name: Xactly Corporation
description: Xactly Corporation is a leading provider of cloud-based enterprise software and services, specializing in sales performance management and intelligent revenue solutions. The company offers a comprehensive platform that helps organizations optimize go-to-market strategies, manage incentive compensation, and improve sales forecasting through AI-driven insights. By providing tools for territory planning, quota management, and commission accounting, Xactly enables businesses to align their sales teams with revenue goals, motivate top talent, and drive predictable performance. Headquartered in the United States, Xactly is dedicated to transforming how companies manage sales effectiveness and achieve sustainable revenue growth.
